metadata.name: Load the Last Container on a Vessel

description: Cargo operations are nearly complete. The foreman must supervise the loading of the final container and hatch cover.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the crane operator and vessel crew that the last container is ready to be loaded.

expected_outcome.value: All parties confirm they are ready for the final move.

nodes.task_description: Oversee the loading of the final container.

expected_outcome.value: The container is safely loaded onto the vessel.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the crane operator to lift the hatch covers back onto the vessel and then boom up the crane.

expected_outcome.value: Hatch covers are replaced, the crane booms up, and the foreman declares 'operations complete' for that vessel.
